top_signals.title: Half of Hormuz Stoppages Restored, US Energy Chief Says
top_signals.summary: US Energy Secretary Chris Wright said roughly 7 million barrels of daily oil and fuel shipments are flowing through the Strait of Hormuz, or about half of the volumes stranded at the start of the Iran war. Wright spoke Friday with Annmarie Hordern during the Bloomberg Energy Security Executive Briefing in Houston.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stock Rally Stalls as Trump Scolds Iran Over Leaks: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wall Street traders left stocks wavering as President Donald Trump complained about Iran leaking terms of a deal to end their war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin Bottom Hunters Are Eyeing Up AI Frenzy and SpaceX IPO
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin’s rebound this week from the depths of despair below $60,000 has reignited a familiar Wall Street ritual: trying to call the bottom.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: California natural gas prices reach historic lows in early 2026
top_signals.summary: Monthly average natural gas spot prices in California reached record lows in the first five months of 2026, dropping to values last recorded in the nationwide low-price market of 2024. Record lows were recorded in Northern California's PG&E Citygate and Southern California's SoCal Border Average; SoCal Citygate prices fell to near-record lows but remained higher than some 2024 prices. Several factors contribute to California's low prices, including above-average inventories and decreasing in-state demand for natural gas-fired electricity.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: New SpaceX millionaires are reinventing the business of managing large wealth
top_signals.summary: Wealth advisors say SpaceXers have unique ways of addressing their financial challenges, including whiteboarding, troubleshooting and AI.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: Trump Regulator Proposes New Rules on What’s Allowed on Prediction Markets  WSJ
